description: Govern your backend control plane from your AI agent - signed, human-approval-gated.
name: io.github.infraveilhq/control-plane

environmentVariables.description: Your Infraveil client id (same one the agent uses)
environmentVariables.name: INFRAVEIL_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: The agent id this MCP server speaks for
environmentVariables.name: INFRAVEIL_AGENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: The agent's existing token; used to sign requests. Never minted here.
environmentVariables.name: INFRAVEIL_AGENT_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Alternative to the four vars above: path to your rendered agent source; ids and token are read from it.
environmentVariables.name: INFRAVEIL_AGENT_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Verify the control plane's response signatures (default on). Set 0 only for debugging.
environmentVariables.name: INFRAVEIL_VERIFY_RESPONSES

title: Infraveil Control Plane
